description: You have a Java project called 'ModularApp' open in Eclipse IDE. The project contains four packages: com.appcore.api (uses java.net.http), com.appcore.model (data model), com.appcore.data (uses java.sql), and com.appcore.logging (uses java.util.logging). Create a Java Platform Module System (JPMS) module descriptor 'module-info.java' in the project's source folder (src/) for a module named 'com.appcore'. The module must require java.net.http, java.sql, and java.logging, and export the public API packages com.appcore.api and com.appcore.model while keeping implementation packages internal. Ensure the project compiles successfully. Save a summary to /home/ga/module_report.txt with the module name on line 1, a comma-separated list of required modules in alphabetical order on line 2, and a comma-separated list of exported packages in alphabetical order on line 3.
